data.title: Jeffs' Brands transitioning to homeland security with Scanary Ltd, AI radar for threat detection without disrupting flow.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, in Tel Aviv, Israel, Jeffs' Brands Ltd. (Nasdaq: JFBR) shared updates on Scanary Ltd., an Israeli deep-tech startup, and its revolutionary AI-powered radar system set to revolutionize concealed threat detection. The innovative technology aims to enhance security measures without impeding the movement of individuals. With rising security concerns such as mass shootings and terrorist activities in public areas, traditional screening methods have proven insufficient. Lengthy queues at metal detectors and X-ray scanners not only cause congestion and frustration but also create weak points through which threats can slip unnoticed. Scanary Ltd.'s advanced radar system offers a solution by utilizing artificial intelligence to identify concealed dangers while ensuring a seamless flow of people.

data.title: ECD Automotive Design sees success with third-party build agreement as initial orders validate demand and boost factory utilization.
data.description: Early orders confirm strong demand, reinforcing factory utilization strategy.

data.title: Kazakhstan's construction industry set to grow by 12.5% in 2025 due to investments and trade partnerships - forecasted to continue to 2029.
data.description: The Kazakhstan construction market is projected to experience a significant growth of 12.5% in real terms in 2025, as per the latest report available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The growth is anticipated to be bolstered by a rise in fixed capital investment, foreign direct investment (FDI), and an upsurge in residential loans. The market analysis covers various sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential segments. The report provides insights and forecasts up to 2029 for the construction industry in Kazakhstan.

data.title: President Xi Jinping meets with HKSAR Chief Executive John Lee and Macao SAR Chief Executive Sam Hou Fai in Beijing.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, in Beijing, President Xi Jinping held separate meetings with Chief Executive John Lee of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region (HKSAR) and Chief Executive Sam Hou Fai of the Macao Special Administrative Region (SAR). The discussions covered various topics, including collaboration and mutual developments between the regions.

data.title: Silver surpasses $70, Novo Nordisk climbs 9% on obesity pill approval; Wall Street sees modest gains, S&P 500 near 6,900. Fed easing expectations decrease on stronger GDP growth of 4.3%, highest in 2 years.
data.description: Correction: In a slight market surge on Tuesday, Wall Street saw major indices edging higher for the fourth consecutive day as investors anticipated a strong year-end. By midday in New York, the S&P 500 rose by 0.4% to around 6,900, nearing last October's record peak of 6,920. The Nasdaq 100 also increased by 0.4%, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average saw a 0.3% climb. Conversely, small caps saw a lag, with the Russell 2000 dropping approximately 0.6%. The market's performance was driven by the release of robust U.S. growth data, showing an expansion of 4.3% at an annualized rate in the third quarter. This surpassed forecasts around 3.3% and marked the quickest growth in two years. Consequently, traders revised their expectations for immediate Federal Reserve easing, with markets now indicating a probability of roughly 15%... Read more on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Clearmind Medicine reflects on transformative 2025 with key advancements, global reach; Focus on CMND-100 for AUD. Nasdaq: CMND (FSE: CWY0) .
data.description: In Vancouver, Canada, on December 24, 2025, Clearmind Medicine Inc. (Nasdaq: CMND), (FSE: CWY0) announced its achievements over the year in developing innovative neuroplastogen-derived therapeutics. The company has been focusing on addressing prevalent health issues with limited treatment options. One of its key milestones includes the advancement of CMND-100, the leading candidate for treating Alcohol Use Disorder (AUD).

data.title: "Analytics Triage" is a new strategy focusing on decision impact rather than technology expansion, developed by The Analytics Doctor.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, in Houston, a new analytics strategy called Analytics Triage was introduced by The Analytics Doctor. This approach aims to shift the focus from technology expansion to decision impact, prioritizing the rapid diagnosis of analytical breakdowns. The strategy is designed to help organizations enhance their decision-making processes efficiently and effectively.

data.title: Avelo Airlines launches international service at ILM, offering nonstop flights to Punta Cana. Avelo serves 15 nonstop routes from Wilmington.
data.description: A new milestone was reached as Avelo Airlines marked its commencement of international flights at Wilmington International Airport (ILM) by introducing nonstop service to Punta Cana, Dominican Republic. Avelo now offers a total of 15 nonstop routes from ILM. This development was announced on December 24, 2025.

data.title: It's a 10 Enterprises offers 40% off haircare, cosmetics, and extensions with free gift. Closing out year with sale.
data.description: Get ready to save big on best-selling haircare, cosmetics, and extensions with a special year-end promotion in Miami. Starting on December 24, 2025, It's a 10 Enterprises, founded by entrepreneur Carolyn Aronson, is offering a discounted price of 40% off on selected items. In addition to the discounted rate, customers will receive a free gift with their purchase. This exclusive promotion is only available for a limited time, so make sure to take advantage of this offer before it ends.

data.title: Aritzia (TSX: ATZ) to release Q3 fiscal 2026 results on January 8, 2026, after market close. Conference call to follow.
data.description: Aritzia Inc. (TSX: ATZ) based in Vancouver, BC, is set to announce its third quarter fiscal 2026 financial results on January 8, 2026, after the market closure. Following the release, a conference call will be held to discuss the earnings report. This conference call is scheduled for Thursday, January 8, 2026.

data.title: Gold stocks operating in Africa's mining sector accelerate timelines with gold posting strongest annual gain since 1979.
data.description: Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. announces that African mining sector in countries like Ghana, Senegal, Mali, and Tanzania is advancing development timelines due to gold achieving its highest annual increase since 1979. This surge indicates positive growth opportunities in the industry.

data.title: European and NATO allies plan to increase defense spending to 5% GDP by 2035, amounting to €381 billion.
data.description: A statement released by VisionWave Holdings, Inc. on December 24, 2025 in Vancouver, BC reported on the outcome of the NATO Foreign Ministers meeting on December 3. European and NATO allies have agreed on a plan to reach a 5% GDP defense spending target by 2035. This decision was made to strengthen defense capabilities and enhance security measures. The commitment to increase defense spending demonstrates the allies' dedication to bolstering national security and defense strategies.

data.title: Meta Platforms stocks slightly rose as analyst maintained Outperform rating, with dividend yield of 0.32% ($2.10 annually).Investors can pocket $500 monthly from dividends.
data.description: Shares of Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) saw a slight increase in Tuesday's trading session. Analyst Colin Sebastian from Baird reaffirmed Meta with an Outperform rating and adjusted the price target to $815 from $820. Despite this adjustment, investors are still intrigued by Meta's recent performance and are considering the potential dividends it offers. Meta currently provides an annual dividend yield of 0.32%, equating to a quarterly dividend of 52.5 cents per share ($2.10 annually). data.title: FDA issues Class I recall for certain Medtronic Left Heart Vent Catheters due to safety concerns, warn continued use could lead to serious injury or death.
data.description: The FDA has been notified by Medtronic Plc (NYSE: MDT) to withdraw specific Left Heart Vent Catheters due to safety concerns. These catheters are utilized to vent the left heart during cardiopulmonary bypass procedures lasting up to six hours. This recall has been classified as a Class I recall by the FDA, which signifies that the continued use of these catheters could lead to severe injury or death. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Clarity Pharmaceuticals' Co-PSMA abstract to be presented at EAU Annual Congress 2026. Company focused on cancer treatments.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, in Sydney, Clarity Pharmaceuticals (ASX: CU6) disclosed their latest developments. The company, dedicated to advancing radiopharmaceuticals for cancer patients, aims to enhance treatment effectiveness.
